page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Easy identification of insertion sequence mobilization events in related bacterial strains with ISCompare.

ISCompare: a new tool for the identification of differentially located insertion sequences on bacteria.

Bacterial genomes are composed by a core and an accessory genome.
